meta.defaultTitle: Snake Online — Multiplayer Snake Battle Royale
meta.defaultDescription: Play Snake Online: the ultimate multiplayer snake .io game. Battle thousands of players, collect rare skins, climb global leaderboards. Free on iOS, Android, and Web.

home.title: Snake Online — Multiplayer Snake Battle Royale
home.description: Outsmart thousands of real players in real time. 200+ legendary skins. Free on iOS, Android, Web.

play.title: Play Snake Online — Free in Browser
play.description: Jump straight into the arena. No install, no signup. Real-time multiplayer snake battles in your browser, free forever.

downloads.title: Download Snake Online — iOS, Android, Windows, Mac
downloads.description: Get Snake Online on every platform. Native apps for iPhone, iPad, Android, Windows and macOS. Cross-progress everywhere. Free forever.

snakes.title: Snake Skins — 200+ Hand-Crafted Characters
snakes.description: Discover over 200 hand-crafted snake skins across six rarity tiers. Country flags, neon, mythic and legendary designs to make your snake unique.

gameRanking.title: Global Leaderboard — Top Snake Online Players
gameRanking.description: Live global ranking of the world's best Snake Online players. Updated hourly. Climb the leaderboard and claim your throne.

community.title: Snake Online Community — Join the Snake Nation
community.description: 5 million players. Discord, tournaments, content creators. Connect with the global Snake Online community and shape the future of the arena.

news.title: News & Updates — Patch Notes and Lore
news.description: Latest patch notes, new skin drops, balance changes, behind-the-scenes lore and developer updates from the Snake Online studio.

about.title: About Snake Online Studio
about.description: The team and story behind Snake Online — the multiplayer snake battle royale played by 5 million people in 180 countries.

contact.title: Contact Snake Online — Press, Partnerships, Support
contact.description: Get in touch with the Snake Online team. Press inquiries, business partnerships, bug reports or just hello — we read everything.

support.title: Snake Online Support — Help Center
support.description: Find answers to common questions, troubleshoot issues, recover your account or contact support directly. We're here to help.

hero.title:
The arena where snakes
become legends.
hero.subtitle: Outsmart thousands of real players in real time. Collect 200+ legendary skins. Conquer global leaderboards.

features.title:
Engineered for the
modern arena.
features.subtitle: Every system, every frame, every snake — designed to make you feel unstoppable.

items.title: Real-Time Multiplayer
items.description: Sub-100ms latency servers in 12 regions. Your reflexes are the only ceiling.

items.title: 200+ Legendary Skins
items.description: From neon serpents to mythic dragons. Collect, evolve, and flex your style.

items.title: Global Leaderboards
items.description: Compete in regional and worldwide rankings. Updated every hour.

items.title: Daily Tournaments
items.description: Free entry. Real prizes. New brackets every 24 hours.

items.title: Cross-Platform
items.description: One account. iOS, Android, Web. Your progress travels with you.

items.title: Friends & Clans
items.description: Build your crew. Squad up. Dominate together.

snakes.title: Meet the snakes.
snakes.subtitle: Hundreds of hand-crafted characters across six rarity tiers.

ranking.title: Global Leaderboard
ranking.subtitle: The best snake players in the world. Updated hourly.
ranking.empty: Rankings are warming up. Check back in a moment.

play.title: Pick your platform.
play.subtitle: Free forever. No download required for web.

community.title: Join the snake nation.
community.subtitle: 5 million players. One arena. Endless stories.

news.title: News & Updates
news.subtitle: Patch notes, lore, and behind-the-scenes from the studio.

about.title: Built by gamers, for gamers.
about.lead: Snake Online started as a love letter to the games we grew up with — and became the .io battle arena we always wanted to play.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Make competitive multiplayer feel effortless on any device, in any language, anywhere on Earth.

items.title: Fair Play
items.body: Zero pay-to-win. Every skin is cosmetic. Skill decides the leaderboard.

items.title: Player First
items.body: We ship updates the community asks for — not the ones spreadsheets demand.

items.title: Performance
items.body: 60 FPS on a 5-year-old phone. Because lag is unacceptable.

contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.subtitle: Press, partnerships, or just a hello — we read everything.
contact.supportLink: Need help with the game? Visit Support →

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Answers, guides, and a real human if you need one.

cta.bannerTitle: Your throne is one game away.

footer.tagline: The world's most-played snake battle arena.

preStart.title: Ready to slither?
preStart.subtitle: Hit the button. Game opens in fullscreen. No install. No ads in the first match.
